expectedAppealCitations: The separate billing of Salpingo-Oophorectomy (Rs. 25,000) is non-compliant as it is standard practice to bundle adnexal clearance with a hysterectomy for a 48-year-old patient.

Proportional deduction was correctly applied under standard IRDAI guidelines in the ratio of 3,000 (eligible room rent) to 8,000 (actual room rent charged), yielding a 37.5% recovery rate on associated variable costs.

The dense pelvic adhesions requiring meticulous adhesiolysis were documented, but do not justify unbundling as standard surgical access includes management of basic adhesions unless a complex pelvic distorting pathology like stage IV endometriosis is established.
